name: gca-intranet-project-e2e-tests
description: End-to-end test suite for the gca intranet wordpress application using Playwright.

scripts.test:qa: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e .env.qa -- playwright test --grep '@regression' --workers=1
scripts.test:dev: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e .env.dev -- playwright test --grep '@regression' --workers=1
scripts.test:docker: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e $WP_DOCKER_CWD/.env.e2e.docker -- playwright test
scripts.test:docker:headed: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e $WP_DOCKER_CWD/.env.e2e.docker -- playwright test --headed
scripts.test:docker:ui: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e $WP_DOCKER_CWD/.env.e2e.docker -- playwright test --ui
scripts.test:docker:a11y: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e $WP_DOCKER_CWD/.env.e2e.docker -- playwright test -c playwright.a11y.config.ts
scripts.test:docker:a11y:headed: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e $WP_DOCKER_CWD/.env.e2e.docker -- playwright test -c playwright.a11y.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:docker:a11y:ui: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e $WP_DOCKER_CWD/.env.e2e.docker -- playwright test -c playwright.a11y.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:a11y:qa: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e .env.qa -- playwright test -c playwright.a11y.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:a11y:dev: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e .env.dev -- playwright test -c playwright.a11y.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.test:a11y:ui: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e .env -- playwright test -c playwright.a11y.config.ts --ui --workers=1
scripts.test:a11y:headed: npm run clean:allure && npx dotenv -e .env -- playwright test -c playwright.a11y.config.ts --headed --workers=1
scripts.report:allure: npx allure generate ./allure-results --clean && npx allure open
scripts.deploy:allure: TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M) && DOMAIN=gca-allure-report-$TIMESTAMP.surge.sh && ZIP=allure-report-$TIMESTAMP.zip && rm -rf allure-report && npx allure generate ./allure-results --clean && zip -r $ZIP allure-report && npx surge ./allure-report $DOMAIN
